wiki.summary: “E85” is the opening track of Don Toliver’s fifth studio album, OCTANE. It was first previewed through the OCTANE trailer on January 22, 2026. Don would then go on The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon on January 26, 2026, performing a part of the song, along with Long Way to Calabasas. E85 samples Chest Pain (I Love) by Malcolm Todd. Read more on Last.fm.
